data.title: Disc Medicine Announces Completion of Enrollment of Phase 3 APOLLO Trial of Bitopertin in Erythropoietic Protoporphyria
data.description: In Watertown, Massachusetts, on March 26, 2026, Disc Medicine, Inc. revealed that the final participant has been randomized and dosed in the significant Phase 3 APOLLO trial of bitopertin in EPP. Initially intended to include 150 individuals, the trial was expanded to accommodate 183 participants in response to the high demand from patients and physicians. Disc Medicine, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IRON, is dedicated to developing and commercializing innovative treatments for individuals facing severe hematologic conditions.

data.title: PyroGenesis completes non-brokered private placement.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking a significant increase from the 3.5% contraction experienced in 2020. The recovery is expected to be supported by strong growth in advanced economies, with the United States leading the way with a projected growth rate of 6.8%. Emerging and developing economies are also anticipated to bounce back with a growth rate of 6.0%. However, the report highlights the uneven distribution of the recovery, with low-income countries facing significant challenges in overcoming the economic impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic. This disparity is further emphasized by the projection that global poverty is expected to rise by around 97 million people in 2021, with a majority of the increase occurring in sub-Saharan Africa. The report underscores the importance of targeted policy measures to ensure a more inclusive and sustainable recovery.

data.title: Kornit Digital Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Kornit Digital LTD., a prominent player in sustainable, on-demand digital fashion and textile production technologies, disclosed on March 26, 2026, that it has submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This comprehensive report encompasses the audited financial statements of Kornit Digital. Interested parties can conveniently access the report on the SEC's official website, http://www.sec.gov, or through the Company's dedicated investor relations website at https://ir.kornit.com/financial-information/sec-filings. This development reinforces Kornit Digital's commitment to transparency and accountability in its financial operations.

data.title: Abundia Global Impact Group Sets Annual Meeting of Stockholders and Provides Update on Its Annual Filings
data.description: Today, Abundia Global Impact Group, Inc. revealed that their 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders is scheduled for May 14, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Central Daylight Time. This meeting by Abundia (NYSE American: AGIG) will provide updates on the company's performance and future plans.

data.title: Granite Secures $495M in Tactical Infrastructure Work
data.description: In Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE:GVA) has secured the LRT-4 Webb-Zapata project from Customs and Border Protection. Valued at around $495 million, this project is set to be part of Granite's initial quarter 2026 CAP. The project involves enhancing tactical infrastructure over 27 miles near Laredo, Texas, with extensive mass excavation, grading, road construction, fencing, and cattle guards. Granite is tasked with constructing seven bridges, eight key components, as part of this significant initiative.

data.title: BTC price nears $70K as traditional finance re-enters market. Global uncertainty and inflation fears curb breakouts.
data.description: Institutional investors are once again embracing Bitcoin, with the cryptocurrency's value hovering around $70,000. However, concerns over global instability and the potential for increased US inflation are preventing BTC from surging higher.

data.title: Japanese financial watchdog raises concerns over KuCoin for unregistered OTC derivatives transactions. Cryptocurrency exchange faces scrutiny for its offerings.
data.description: The cryptocurrency exchange has faced scrutiny from Japanese authorities in the past for providing products and services without the required registration.

data.title: Veritone Reports Preliminary, Unaudited Q4 2025 Results and Announces Strategic Deal with Oracle
data.description: Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), a prominent enterprise AI and data solutions provider based in Irvine, California, revealed preliminary unaudited financial figures for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. President and CEO of Veritone, Ryan Steelberg, emphasized the company's transition towards enhanced execution, scalability, and financial stewardship. The announcement reflects their optimism surrounding the bolstered balance sheet and expanding VDR.

data.title: CreatorIQ Deepens Partnership with YouTube With Integration Unlocking Audience Insights for Smarter Creator Campaigns
data.description: In an announcement at the YouTube NewFront event in Los Angeles, it was revealed that CreatorIQ, a worldwide operating system for creator-led growth, has broadened its partnership with YouTube. The integration involves incorporating the YouTube Creator Partnership API to provide more comprehensive, first-party measurement capabilities and enhance accountability within the creator economy. Through this integration, first-party YouTube data for creators is seamlessly incorporated into CreatorIQ's AI-driven Discovery platform. This advancement enables brands to assess creators based on authentic figures.

data.title: XORTX Announces Change of Effective Date of Share Consolidation
data.description: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a clinical pharmaceutical company, is postponing its share consolidation plan due to approval delays. The consolidation, initially scheduled for March 27, 2026, where shareholders would receive 1 new common share for every 5 old common shares, will now take place on April 6, 2026. This decision comes after the Company's announcement on March 25, 2026. XORTX is focused on developing therapies for gout and progressive kidney disease. The consolidation is subject to approvals from the TSX Venture Exchange and Nasdaq Stock Exchange. (Approx. 347 words)

data.title: Mega Uranium Announces Results of Annual Shareholder Meeting
data.description: Today, Mega Uranium Ltd. (TSX: MGA) disclosed the outcomes of its recent annual shareholder meeting in Toronto. All candidates on the ballot were successfully voted in as directors by a clear majority of shareholders. The voting results for each director position were based on shares cast either in person or by proxy. The specific numbers related to the election were not mentioned.

data.title: HelloNation Highlights City of Freeport's Emerging Contaminants Grant Award for New Well and Water Quality Improvements
data.description: In Freeport, Illinois on March 26, 2026, a significant state-funded infrastructure grant has been announced, aimed at supporting infrastructure upgrades and ensuring safer drinking water for the community. This funding is expected to have a transformative impact on the future of drinking water in Freeport. The grant will not only enhance the existing infrastructure but also significantly improve the quality and safety of the drinking water supply. The community can anticipate improved water treatment processes, increased access to clean water, and a reduction in water-related health risks. This funding is a crucial step towards ensuring a sustainable and secure water supply for the residents of Freeport.

data.title: Celo celebrates 1 year as Ethereum L2 with 840K daily users, $65.9B volume, 14M wallets, CELO at $0.083.
data.description: Celebrating its first year as an Ethereum Layer 2 platform, Celo has achieved impressive milestones, with an all-time high of 840,000 daily users and a stablecoin volume reaching $65.9 billion. Additionally, the platform has successfully garnered 14 million MiniPay wallets. The native token, CELO, is currently trading at $0.083.

data.title: ARK Invest Adopts Kalshi to Better Inform Investors
data.description: In New York, ARK Invest and Kalshi have teamed up to promote institutional adoption of prediction markets as innovative analysis and risk management tools. This collaboration aims to leverage prediction markets' ability to provide real-time probability signals on future outcomes by consolidating various data sources. Prediction markets are gaining traction as a novel financial research tool, with Kalshi being recognized as the world's largest prediction market.ARK Invest's focus on disruptive innovation and Kalshi's expertise in prediction markets will likely enhance analytical insights and risk management strategies for institutional investors. This partnership signifies a strategic move towards integrating prediction markets into the traditional investment landscape, reflecting a growing interest in leveraging diverse information for making informed investment decisions.

data.title: Consumer Watchdog Files New Supreme Court Brief Challenging Unlawful Tariff "Modifications" That Raise Prices For Working Families
data.description: Consumer Watchdog is requesting the Supreme Court to review a Federal Circuit decision that permits a sevenfold increase in Section 301 China tariffs without significant constraints. The organization filed an amicus curiae brief on March 26, 2026, in Los Angeles. This decision could have severe implications for businesses and consumers, as it allows for significant tariff expansion without effective limits.

data.title: Google Moves Up Quantum Encryption Deadline To 2029: What Does It Mean For Bitcoin?
data.description: Alphabet Inc. has announced a 2029 deadline to transition its entire infrastructure to post-quantum cryptography, surpassing the U.S. federal government's 2035 mandate and the NSA's 2031 deadline. This move is in response to the acceleration of quantum capabilities, with Google's VP of Security Engineering and Senior Staff Cryptography Engineer highlighting advancements in quantum hardware and error correction. The company has identified two key threats: "store-now-decrypt-later" attacks and risks to digital signatures used in authentication and blockchain transactions. This decision may have significant implications for Bitcoin. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: NEUBERGER ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE AND INCOME FUND ANNOUNCES INCREASE IN DISTRIBUTION RATE AND DECLARATION OF NEXT MONTHLY DISTRIBUTION
data.description: In March 26, 2026, Neuberger Energy Infrastructure and Income Fund Inc. (NYSE American: NML) disclosed a rise in its monthly distribution rate to $0.07008 per share from the previous rate of $0.0584 per share for common stock.

data.title: Hormel Foods Announces Retirement of Richard Carlson, Vice President of Global Food Safety and Quality Management
data.description: In Austin, Minnesota, on March 26, 2026, Hormel Foods Corporation revealed Jeremiah Johnson as the new director of food safety management. The company, a Fortune 500 global branded food company trading under NYSE: HRL, also shared that Richard Carlson, the previous vice president of global food safety and quality, would be succeeded by Johnson.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser to Release First Quarter Results on April 30
data.description: Join the live webcast and conference call scheduled for May 1 at 7 a.m. PT (10 a.m. ET). The financial report for the first quarter of 2026 by Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) will be released on April 30 after the market closes. This event follows the announcement made in Seattle on March 26, 2026. The conference call will offer insights into the company's performance and prospects.

data.title: Utz Brands, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Hanover, Pennsylvania, Utz Brands, Inc., a prominent U.S. producer of branded salty snacks and a small-cap growth and value Staples equity, has revealed that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of around $0.063 per share on the Company’s Class A Common Stock. The dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on April 23, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of April 13, 2026.
